name: Valentine
description: Hearts that melt into drops and beans and back again — every redraw lets each sweet pick a new shape, tilt and blush.

code.style: --sweet: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --form: @p(@shape(heart), @shape(heart), @shape(drop), @shape(bean)); --tilt: @rand(-20deg, 20deg); --pump: @rand(0.7, 1.05); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 8%; background: var(--sweet); clip-path: var(--form); transform: rotate(var(--tilt)) scale(var(--pump)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
